---
title: "pharmaverse"
---

The R packages built specifically for clinical trial work: `admiral` (ADaM datasets), `xportr` (XPT v5 transport files), `metacore`/`metatools` (specs and metadata), `tfrmt` (tables), `pharmaversesdtm` (test data). This is the stack that makes R viable for regulated submissions.

*Entries to come as I incorporate these into real ADaM work.*
